name.description: The name of the registered model

catalog_name.description: The name of the catalog where the schema and the registered model reside

schema_name.description: The name of the schema where the registered model resides

storage_location.description: The storage location on the cloud under which model version data files are stored

full_name.description: The three-level (fully qualified) name of the registered model

comment.description: The comment attached to the registered model

owner.description: The identifier of the user who owns the registered model

created_at.description: Creation timestamp of the registered model in milliseconds since the Unix epoch

created_by.description: The identifier of the user who created the registered model

updated_at.description: Last-update timestamp of the registered model in milliseconds since the Unix epoch

updated_by.description: The identifier of the user who updated the registered model last time

id.description: Unique identifier for the registered model.
